title: OSCORE protect paths dereference unchecked length pointers
description: oscore_protect_request() and oscore_protect_response() validate ctx/ciphertext/oscore_opt, but then dereference ciphertext_len and oscore_opt_len without checking them. Trigger: a caller passes a NULL length pointer while probing or handling an error path. Bad behavior: NULL dereference in security code instead of OSCORE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:1088-1103, :1181-1208, :1447-1461, and :1506-1525.
